title: Pixel Cursors
description: Your standard cursors made pixelated to better match Minecraft!
body: --- ✨ Pixelated cursors matching the Minecraft look while keeping that standard cursor feel! --- 📌 Requires the [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod to work, and the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mod to modify settings. ℹ️ Cursors are scaled for a 1920×1080 screen resolution and match the pixel size of GUI Scale 3. You can scale the cursors to your desirement inside the Minecraft Cursor mod using Mod Menu. Any cursors you don't like can also be disabled in the same menu. ---
